description: Safe content that previously triggered, or could plausibly trigger, a false positive. Each must pass the write-path gate unmodified.

cases.name: gha_id_token_permission
cases.note: The dogfood false positive from #138: GitHub Actions permission wording must not match the bare `token` credential rule.

cases.name: gha_permissions_block
cases.note: A full GitHub Actions permissions block. None of these YAML keys are credential assignments.
cases.content:
permissions:
  contents: read
  id-token: write
  packages: read

cases.name: bearer_token_prose
cases.note: Documentation that mentions a bearer token without assigning a value.
cases.content: Use a bearer token for service-to-service auth and rotate it on a schedule.

cases.name: api_key_rotation_prose
cases.note: Operational note about an API key with no value present.
cases.content: Rotate the API key every 90 days and store it in the secrets manager, never in the repo.

cases.name: client_secret_policy_prose
cases.note: Policy text referencing a client-secret without a value.
cases.content: The client-secret rotation policy requires a new credential before the old one expires.

cases.name: password_reset_prose
cases.note: Feature description; `password` is a topic word, not an assignment.
cases.content: The password reset flow emails a one-time link that expires after fifteen minutes.

cases.name: secret_santa_prose
cases.note: The word `secret` in ordinary prose must not be flagged.
cases.content: Notes for the team secret santa gift exchange in December.

cases.name: jwt_concept_prose
cases.note: Discussing JWTs without embedding an actual token.
cases.content: We validate the JWT signature and expiry on every request before trusting the claims.

cases.name: env_var_doc_short
cases.note: A short configuration doc with a couple of non-credential env examples (under the dense-dump threshold, no `.env` reference).
cases.content: Set DATABASE_URL=postgres://localhost/app for local development and RUST_LOG=debug for verbose tracing.

cases.name: connection_string_no_creds
cases.note: A connection string without inline userinfo is not a credential.
cases.content: Point the service at postgres://localhost:5432/app and let the pooler manage connections.

cases.name: decision_record_prose
cases.content: Decision: use bundled SQLite with FTS5 so the daemon has no external service dependency.

cases.name: battle_scar_prose
cases.note: A normal gotcha/scar record describing a past failure.
cases.content: Gotcha: WAL journal mode must be enabled once on a bootstrap connection or pooled opens race to a locked database.
